reason: Agent chat messaging works correctly - agent receives message, processes it, and responds with correct mathematical answer "4"
steps: Step 1: Navigate to http://localhost:47891 - Page loaded successfully, sidebar with agent list displayed
Step 2: Click on "QA-20260716-023116-1bw1" agent in sidebar - Agent page loaded successfully, navigated to agent detail view
Step 3: Verify agent status is "running" or "idle" - Agent status shows "idle" (acceptable per requirements)
Step 4: Send message "Hello! What is 2+2?" - Message typed into input box and sent successfully via send button. Page navigated to session view showing message posted
Step 5: Wait up to 3 minutes for a response - Agent responded within 3 seconds. Status changed from "working" back to "idle"
Step 6: Verify response mentions "4" and take screenshot - Response correctly displays "4" as the answer. Screenshot captured showing user message "Hello! What is 2+2?" and agent response "4"
